extracted_equations.text: = coherence (0 = full decoherence, 1 = full alignment with God).
= entropy / sin pressure. Plain English: the same equation that governs a single soul also governs a civilization â€” growth is multiplicative (
= coupled to the Holy Spirit; protection layer active.
= inverted coupling, voluntary alignment with the adversarial field.
= uncoupled (infants, the unreached, and possibly all of humanity pre-Pentecost).

= total alignment. (Defined in Article 03.) Openness (O) The human variable in the growth term. The willingness to receive. The article identifies this with free will. Grace (G) The divine input. The negentropic energy without which the equation only decays. The article identifies this with mercy. Entropy / Sin (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C

Earlier in this series we wrote down the equation that governs how a soul moves into or away from coherence with God. It came up first in Article 03, where it dissolved the Calvinist-Arminian fight. It came up again in Article 04, where the lifespan data in Genesis turned out to fit it at $R^2 = 0.888$. Here it is again:
Framework Reference: Theophysics Master Equation χ = ∭(G·M·E·S·T·K·R·Q·F·C) dx dy dt
The state variable for alignment with God. $0$ = total decoherence, $1$ = total alignment. (Defined in Article 03.)
